test-case.name: CancelRequests_ClearsState
test-case.output: [NPCFlow] SceneBootstrap/Warning level=Warning source=NPCFlowLogger request=- npc=- durationMs=0 :: Auto-created fallback NPCFlowLogger. Add an explicit scene logger for Inspector-controlled settings. [NPCFlow] RequestStart/Skipped level=Warning source=NPCDialogueManager request=- npc=- durationMs=0 :: No NPC selected! Call SwitchToNPC() first.

test-case.name: CaptureAndApplyHistorySnapshot_RoundTrips
test-case.output: [NPCFlow] NPCSwitch/Start level=Info source=NPCDialogueManager request=- npc=butler durationMs=0 :: NPCSwitch started. [NPCFlow] SceneBootstrap/Start level=Info source=NPCDialogueManager request=- npc=- durationMs=0 :: SceneBootstrap started. [NPCFlow] ConfigurationValidation/Warning level=Warning source=NPCDialogueManager request=- npc=- durationMs=0 :: LocalRAG reference not set. Prompt-only mode will be used. [NPCFlow] HistoryLoad/Skipped level=Info source=NPCHistoryStore request=- npc=- durationMs=0 :: History file does not exist; starting empty history. [NPCFlow] LocalRagReady/Skipped level=Debug source=NPCDialogueManager request=- npc=- durationMs=0 :: RAG is disabled. Skipping RAG initialization. [NPCFlow] SceneBootstrap/Success level=Info source=NPCDialogueManager request=- npc=- durationMs=8 :: Initialization complete. [NPCFlow] NPCSwitch/Success level=Info source=NPCDialogueManager request=- npc=butler durationMs=10 :: Switched to NPC: Butler

test-case.name: ClearHistory_WithName_ClearsSingleNpc

test-case.name: SendMessage_NoProfileSelected_RaisesError
test-case.output: [NPCFlow] RequestStart/Skipped level=Warning source=NPCDialogueManager request=- npc=- durationMs=0 :: No NPC selected! Call SwitchToNPC() first.

test-case.name: SwitchingToKnownProfileSetsCurrentProfileAndRaisesNpcChangedEvent

test-case.name: SwitchToNPCAsync_UnknownSlug_RaisesError
test-case.output:
[NPCFlow] NPCSwitch/Start level=Info source=NPCDialogueManager request=- npc=nonexistent durationMs=0 :: NPCSwitch started.
